attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT 
COALESCE(EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPE,'UNK') AS PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPE,
EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.PARAMETER_ID AS PARAMETER_ID,
COALESCE(EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT,'UNK') AS WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT,
EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.PROMPT AS PROMPT,
EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.CREATED_BY AS CREATED_BY,
EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.CREATION_DATE AS CREATION_DATE,
EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.GES_UPDATE_DATE AS  GES_UPDATE_DATE,
EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.LAST_UPDATED_BY AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS.COMPANY_POLICY_ID as COMPANY_POLICY_ID, 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_PRMS

groups.name: UPDATE
groups.expression:
IIF(NOT ISNULL(LKP_GLOBAL_NAME) AND 
NOT ISNULL(LKP_PARAMETER_ID) AND 
(IIF(ISNULL(LKP_PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPE),'UNK',LKP_PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPE) != IIF(ISNULL(PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPE),'UNK',PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPE) OR
IIF(ISNULL(LKP_WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT),'UNK',LKP_WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT) != IIF(ISNULL(WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT),'UNK',WEB_FRIENDLY_PROMPT) OR
LKP_PROMPT  !=  PROMPT OR
LKP_CREATED_BY != CREATED_BY OR
LKP_CREATION_DATE != CREATION_DATE OR
LKP_GES_UPDATE_DATE != GES_UPDATE_DATE OR
LKP_LAST_UPDATED_BY != LAST_UPDATED_BY OR
LKP_LAST_UPDATE_DATE != LAST_UPDATE_DATE OR
IIF(ISNULL(LKP_COMPANY_POLICY_ID),999,LKP_COMPANY_POLICY_ID) != IIF(ISNULL(COMPANY_POLICY_ID),999,COMPANY_POLICY_ID)),TRUE,FALSE)
